ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan (e.g., Free, Premium, Business, Enterprise) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the plan */,
  "trial_period" INTEGER /* Duration of the free trial period for the plan */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed per poll */,
  "max_files_per_poll" INTEGER /* Maximum number of files that can be uploaded per poll */,
  "max_file_size" REAL /* Maximum size of files that can be uploaded */,
  "vote_for_files" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the plan allows voting for files/images */,
  "set_limit_per_option" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the plan allows setting a vote limit per option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan to which the feature belongs */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Participants per Voting, Files per PollUnit) */,
  "limit_value" TEXT /* Limit value for the feature */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature is enabled by default for the plan */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature can be customized by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_features_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's current plan */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "trial_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the trial period expires for the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account (for audit purposes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the poll */,
  "poll_title" TEXT /* Title of the poll */,
  "poll_description" TEXT /* Description of the poll */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the poll was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the poll (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the poll will close */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the poll is public or private */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the poll allows anonymous voting */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the poll has been deleted */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the poll was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll option */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll to which the option belongs */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text for the poll option */,
  "option_order" INTEGER /* Order of the option in the poll */,
  "vote_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of votes allowed for the option (if applicable) */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the option is a custom option added by the user */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the option has been deleted */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the option was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_options_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll to which the file belongs */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the file is stored */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, document) */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file has been deleted */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_files_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being voted on */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option being voted for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user casting the vote */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the vote was cast */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the vote was cast anonymously */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the vote has been deleted */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the vote was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES poll_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user, moderator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is the default role for new users */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role assignment has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_invitations" (
  "invitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invitation */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being invited to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being invited */,
  "invited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the invitation */,
  "invited_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the invitation was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invitation (e.g., pending, accepted, declined) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent with the invitation */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the invitation has been deleted */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the invitation was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_invitations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_invitations_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_invitations_invited_by FOREIGN KEY ("invited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment has been deleted */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_comments_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
